review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify the implementation changes are limited to creating 'tasks/v0.7-m6-c-comparative-synthesis.md'.

Verify the final synthesis document summarizes evidence-based assessments from M6-A and M6-B, compares the V0.7 Unified Model with alternative non-intrusive schema injections, and formalizes V0.8 implementation epics.
Verify NO actual implementation of the V0.8 candidates occurred.
Verify NO active .agent-state/ physical migrations occurred.
Verify NO codebase modification in src/ occurred.
Verify NO changes to workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models occurred in the implementation commit.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
